subject: [w15] Conduct full profile interview with user
body:
Resume the life inventory interview — Phase 2 is COMPLETE. A draft exists at ~/exoselfai/docs/user-profile-draft.json. Invoke do-stuff-helper:user-profile-builder to resume.

Completed: Phase 1 (overview) + all 12 Phase 2 areas.

Remaining: Phase 3 (ideal future & goals — per-area ideal, importance ratings, yearly theme, major goals), Phase 4 (skills, strengths & habits — work habits, known tendencies, strengths/skills inventory).

Estimated remaining time: ~30-40 minutes.
context: Interview started 2026-02-28, Phase 2 completed 2026-02-28. The skill will auto-detect the draft and offer to resume at Phase 3. Key themes: side business ($50K/year net) as a meta-goal unlocking multiple areas, schedule consistency as a keystone habit, location dissatisfaction (Novato) with financial constraints, career focus bottleneck at work, social life and adventure are the weakest areas (both rated 2), novelty-over-completion pattern in personal projects, household time tax consuming best energy.
resolution: Profile interview completed. All four phases finished: Phase 1 (overview), Phase 2 (all 12 life areas with ratings and bottlenecks), Phase 3 (ideal future, importance ratings, yearly theme 'Year of Launch', 6 major goals), Phase 4 (work habits, known tendencies, strengths & skills). Final profile saved to ~/exoselfai/docs/user-profile.json and committed.
